_doc: Failing SecurePortalBot job. Info is a credential-RETRIEVAL failure from the Orchestrator Database credential store — no logon was attempted (no 0x0000052E / Logon failed). The store backend is unreachable. Distinct from robot-credentials (wrong password) and job-faulted-logon-failure (LSA rejects a logon).

Data.Info: Unable to retrieve credentials from Orchestrator Database credential store. Please check your connection settings and ensure the Orchestrator Database service is running.
